questionText: Complete a frase com a forma verbal correta: 'The professor insisted that every student _____ the assignment before the deadline.'
Escolha a preposição correta: 'She has been studying _____ the university for three years.'
Qual a forma correta do verbo na frase: 'He _____ his thesis when the power went out.'
Selecione o artigo adequado: 'She gave _____ inspiring lecture on cognitive development.'
Complete com a conjunção correta: 'He studied hard _____ he failed the exam.'
Qual o tempo verbal correto: 'By the time she graduates, she _____ at the university for five years.'
Escolha o pronome relativo correto: 'The textbook _____ we studied last semester is now outdated.'
Complete com o modal correto: 'Students _____ submit their papers online by midnight.'
Selecione a forma correta do comparativo: 'The new curriculum is _____ than the previous one.'
Qual a forma passiva correta: 'The dean _____ the new academic policy yesterday.'
Complete a frase com a forma correta: 'The research findings _____ by the academic committee last week.'
Qual o quantificador correto: 'There are _____ opportunities for international exchange at this university.'
Escolha a preposição correta: 'The students are responsible _____ completing the project independently.'
Complete com o tempo verbal adequado: 'She _____ teaching at this school since 2015.'
Selecione o adjetivo na forma correta: 'The _____ student in the class received a full scholarship.'
Qual a construção correta com 'wish': 'I wish I _____ more time to study for the entrance exam.'
Complete com a forma correta do gerúndio ou infinitivo: 'The professor encouraged the students _____ critical thinking skills.'
Qual é o uso correto do subjuntivo presente em inglês: 'The committee recommended that the professor _____ the grading criteria.'
Identifique a construção correta com inversão: '_____ had the dean announced the new policy than protests erupted among faculty.'
Complete com a estrutura correta de cleft sentence: 'It was the lack of academic resources _____ led to the school's poor performance.'
Qual o uso correto de 'used to' versus 'would': 'When she was a student, she _____ stay up all night reading.'
Escolha a forma correta de particípio em construção absoluta: '_____ all the research, the professor submitted the paper to the journal.'
Qual a forma correta da voz passiva com modal perfeito: 'The original manuscript _____ by the time the archive opened.'
Selecione a oração condicional mista correta: 'If she _____ harder as a child, she would be a renowned scholar today.'
Qual o conector correto para introduzir uma concessão formal: 'The theory is widely accepted; _____, some scholars have raised legitimate objections.'
Identifique o uso correto do gerúndio como sujeito: '_____ multiple languages simultaneously has been shown to enhance cognitive flexibility.'
Complete com a forma correta do reported speech: 'The lecturer said that the exam _____ the following Monday.'
Qual a preposição correta na expressão formal: 'The scholarship is contingent _____ maintaining a GPA above 3.8.'
Escolha a construção nominal correta: 'The _____ of the research findings proved controversial among academics.'
Identifique o uso correto do artigo definido: 'She was admitted to _____ Oxford University after submitting an exceptional portfolio.'
Qual é a construção com 'rather' que expressa preferência formal: 'The academic board would rather the students _____ their proposals before the symposium.'
Selecione a forma correta com 'despite': 'Despite _____ all the required readings, he still struggled to engage with the seminar discussions.'
Complete com a forma correta: 'The new pedagogical approach, _____ by the Ministry of Education, has transformed classroom dynamics.'
Qual a forma correta de negação enfática com inversão: '_____ a single student grasped the implications of the professor's groundbreaking hypothesis.'
Qual estrutura de ênfase está correta: 'It is the student's perseverance, _____ her innate talent, that has driven her academic success.'
Identifique o uso correto do subjuntivo passado em contexto formal educacional: 'The accreditation board demanded that the institution _____ its financial disclosures immediately.'
Qual construção de inversão com negação inicial está correta: '_____ did the faculty anticipate the far-reaching consequences of the curriculum overhaul.'
Selecione o uso preciso do particípio em oração reduzida: 'The dissertation, _____ over a decade of ethnographic fieldwork, was hailed as a seminal contribution.'
Qual forma é gramaticalmente correta nesta estrutura apositiva: 'The professor's central thesis — _____ education systems perpetuate socioeconomic inequality — was met with fierce debate.'
Complete com a forma modal perfeita que expressa crítica retrospectiva: 'The university _____ stricter plagiarism policies before the scandal erupted.'
Identifique o uso correto do gerúndio possessivo em registro formal: 'The board objected to _____ the budget allocation without prior consultation.'
Qual é o uso correto de 'as' em construção de proporção: '_____ the students progressed through the programme, the assessments grew increasingly rigorous.'
Selecione a construção nominal fativa correta: 'The fact _____ peer-reviewed research underpins evidence-based pedagogy is now universally acknowledged.'
Qual construção de condicional hipotética de alto registro está correta: '_____ the funding been approved, the longitudinal study would have yielded transformative insights.'
Qual verbo de relato mantém o matiz epistêmico correto: 'Several scholars _____ to have overstated the impact of standardised testing on learning outcomes.'
Complete com a forma correta do infinitivo perfeito passivo: 'The seminal paper appears _____ without proper attribution of the original source.'
Qual estrutura de clivagem pseudocleft é mais adequada formalmente: '_____ the professor emphasised most was the importance of independent critical inquiry.'
Identifique a forma correta com o verbo causativo em registro acadêmico: 'The provost had the academic calendar _____ to accommodate the international assessment schedule.'
Qual é o uso gramaticalmente preciso de 'whereby' em escrita acadêmica: 'The university adopted a new assessment framework _____ students are evaluated on competency rather than rote memorisation.'
Complete a construção de particípio perfeito absoluto: '_____ the inadequacy of existing methodologies, the research team devised an entirely novel evaluative paradigm.'
